title: Class of 2021 Master’s Convocation
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Class of 2021 Master’s Convocation
NYU Shanghai held a Master’s Convocation on Sunday, May 30, 2021 at 10 AM for graduates of the second classes of the master’s programs in Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages (TESOL), Quantitative Finance, and Data Analytics & Business Computing.
During the event, NYU Shanghai Chancellor Tong Shijun, Vice Chancellor Jeffrey Lehman, Provost Joanna Waley-Cohen, NYU Steinhardt Dean Jack Knott, and NYU Stern Dean Raghu Sundaram delivered messages recognizing the accomplishments of the 105 graduates. Student speakers, Zhang Yijia, MA ’21, and Liu Kun, MS ’21, represented their respective programs, and each graduate's name was read by faculty representatives.
Watch the 2021 Master's Convocation highlight video:
Watch the entire ceremony here.
Read more about the Convocationhere.
Graduate Spotlights:
Jiayi Xu/Xinyi Wang/Junyu Zhang, M.S. '21
Evan Ma/Yuanfan Lai/Chengzhuo Huang, M.S. ‘21
Erbin Huang, M.A. ‘21
Yijia Zhang, M.A. ‘21
Ling Mei, M.A. ‘21
Shi Hongyue, M.S. ‘21
Liu Haoyang, M.S. ‘21

Welcome from NYU Stern Dean Raghu Sundaram
